story: From our high apartment, I guard my mistress. Today she is croaky and slow. At dinner she gives me a meager, cold portion with no biscuits, then shuffles back to the couch and turns to the TV. She thinks, tired, I'll rest through this scene; at the break I'll warm his food and crush in the biscuits. I wait by my bowl, the cold mound affronting my dignity, while she sniffs and pulls her blanket close.
implausible_knowledge: She thinks, tired, I'll rest through this scene; at the break I'll warm his food and crush in the biscuits.
question: What will Samuel do next to get the proper meal?
answer_with_knowledge: Wait by the bowl for the commercial break, expecting warmed food with biscuits.
answer_without_knowledge: Make a noisy scene—meow loudly and cause mischief until she gets up and follows him to the bowl.
